text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! Tannhauser got hives and has to rest, doctor's orders?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... She drank something iffy last night, and after that intense
training, maybe it was all a bit too much for her.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I hope she's okay... Oh, shall we all go and check on her together?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Well, we could... but I think we should continue our training!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
With the limited time we've got, I think the best thing to do right now
is focus all our attention on practicing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Between us, we can make up for Matikanetannhauser's absence. By
reducing each of our individual times, we can create a big lead!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
If we create a lead... I see! You're right, that sounds like a better way
to help her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I agree! But judging by the joint training we did, we still have a long
way to go if we want to win. It's gonna be tough.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
No matter how hard it is, where there's a will, there's a way. Ryan,
may I ask for a revision of our training program?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Okay! Let's sit over there and talk it over.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(As things stand, it's clear that I am still very far behind everyone. I
must do everything possible to catch up to them!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: (I've got to win and make Big Sister Ryan proud!)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
"Don't worry about the triathlon. Take all the time you need to rest
up."

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Tannhauser! We've come to visit you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh?! Is that you, Kita? Come on in.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to bother you as you're resting. Oh? I heard you broke out in
hives, but...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ah, it's nothing too serious. Just a little rash on my back and belly.
Once the symptoms wear off, I can come back to practice.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: That's a relief! So, you can still compete in the triathlon!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I'm lagging behind now that I've had some time off though. I'll
have to practice even harder once I get better.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Please don't overdo it! Your teammates are practicing enough to
make up for your absence.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: They are?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
The three of them said they'll do everything they can! I'm sure they're
training on your behalf too!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: So take all the time you need to make a full recovery.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! On that note, we'll get going. I'll leave some snacks for you
next to the desk, okay?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Right... Everyone's pulling together. In that case, I'll do what I can
too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I don't think so. I'm inviting you because I've seen how good you are
at gathering information and applying your research to training.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: That's it!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant. My acceleration's still too slow... One more lap!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Are you doing some extra training too?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Are you about to start too? I thought you were practicing with
your team just now.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Well, training with them was so exciting, I wanted to run some
more!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Exciting, you say?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Just now, when we all ran, it was sooooo close at the end! It was so
fun fighting everyone to get in front!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I got so into it, I felt like I had it in me to keep going forever! That's
kinda weird, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
No, I think it's great! You have a special way of seeing things. You're
amazing!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
...As for me, I'm not sure I've been running at the same level as
everyone else on my team. It made me realize I can't afford to skip
out on extra practice.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I don't want to fall behind... That's what's keeping me here.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Aren't we kinda the same? You and me are both practicing
because we want to get better.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
In your case, it's because you have teammates that you want to
surpass. I think that's wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And I'm the same. I have people I want to surpass too. No matter what
the race, I want to win against everybody!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Someone I want to win against...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I get it now! You're right! It's not such a bad thing to compare
myself to others!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah! You can all help each other grow!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Yeah... You know what? You're right!
